title: AI is now a capital allocation decision, and CFOs are setting the terms
description: CFOs across Australia and New Zealand are tightening AI spending as new research shows weak returns, poor data readiness and rising demands for accountability.

title: Ask AI when the cherry trees will bloom
description: The time-honoured tradition of ‘hanami’, or flower viewing, has got a new tech upgrade
